# General Platform Backlog (2026-04-26)

## Scope

This folder contains cross-cutting, non-module-specific planning work for Oliver App. It includes

- `oliver-requirements` (foundational app requirements, policy, and platform-wide capabilities)
- `oliver-ux-audit` (global UX consistency and parity findings)
- `outstanding-build-priorities` (epics that require sequencing and sequencing evidence)
- `outstanding-wip` (current cross-cutting WIP tracking and release hygiene)
- `platform-governance` (admin/design-system/auth/ops ownership and infra parity workstreams)

## Backlog convention

- Module-specific stories live in their module folder.
- Cross-cutting stories live here.
- PRD/user-story material for this area should be tracked via one canonical folder and de-duplicated at entry points.
- Completed stories should be moved to `Done` + `Verified` when evidence exists and removed from active planning files according to the story lifecycle.

## Canonical references

- This area replaces prior monolithic names such as `general-platform-backlog`.
- Module workstreams remain in:
  - `accounts-module`
  - `campaigns-module`
  - `chatbot-module`
  - `crm-module`
  - `hr-module`
  - `reviews-module`
  - `sdr-module`
  - `slides-module`
